title: Use Compound Components
applicable_when: enables flexible composition without prop drilling

title: Prefer Composing Children Over Render Props
React 19 API Changes
applicable_when: cleaner component definitions and context usage

title: Define Generic Context Interfaces for Dependency Injection
Decouple State Management from UI
applicable_when: enables swapping state implementations without changing UI

title: Lift State into Provider Components
applicable_when: enables state sharing outside component boundaries

title: Do Not Put Effect Events in Dependency Arrays
applicable_when: avoids unnecessary effect re-runs and lint errors

title: Initialize App Once, Not Per Mount
Prevent Waterfall Chains in API Routes
Check Cheap Conditions Before Async Flags
applicable_when: avoids unnecessary async work when a synchronous guard already fails

title: Prefer Statically Analyzable Paths
applicable_when: avoids accidental broad bundles and file traces

title: Conditional Module Loading
applicable_when: loads large data only when needed

title: Version and Minimize localStorage Data
applicable_when: prevents schema conflicts, reduces storage size

title: Use Passive Event Listeners for Scrolling Performance
applicable_when: eliminates scroll delay caused by event listeners

title: Avoid Layout Thrashing
applicable_when: prevents forced synchronous layouts and reduces performance bottlenecks

title: Use flatMap to Map and Filter in One Pass
Build Index Maps for Repeated Lookups
Early Length Check for Array Comparisons
applicable_when: avoids expensive operations when lengths differ

title: Use Loop for Min/Max Instead of Sort
applicable_when: O(n) instead of O(n log n)

title: Defer Non-Critical Work with requestIdleCallback
applicable_when: keeps UI responsive during background tasks

title: Use toSorted() Instead of sort() for Immutability
applicable_when: prevents mutation bugs in React state

title: Animate SVG Wrapper Instead of SVG Element
Prevent Hydration Mismatch Without Flickering
applicable_when: avoids visual flicker and hydration errors

title: Suppress Expected Hydration Mismatches
applicable_when: avoids noisy hydration warnings for known differences

title: Use React DOM Resource Hints
applicable_when: reduces load time for critical resources

title: Use defer or async on Script Tags
Use useTransition Over Manual Loading States
applicable_when: reduces re-renders and improves code clarity

title: Defer State Reads to Usage Point
Calculate Derived State During Rendering
applicable_when: avoids redundant renders and state drift

title: Use Functional setState Updates
applicable_when: prevents stale closures and unnecessary callback recreations

title: Extract Default Non-primitive Parameter Value from Memoized Component to Constant
applicable_when: restores memoization by using a constant for default value

title: Put Interaction Logic in Event Handlers
applicable_when: avoids effect re-runs and duplicate side effects

title: Do not wrap a simple expression with a primitive result type in useMemo
Use useDeferredValue for Expensive Derived Renders
applicable_when: keeps input responsive during heavy computation

title: Use useRef for Transient Values
applicable_when: avoids unnecessary re-renders on frequent updates

title: Authenticate Server Actions Like API Routes
applicable_when: prevents unauthorized access to server mutations

title: Avoid Duplicate Serialization in RSC Props
applicable_when: reduces network payload by avoiding duplicate serialization

title: Hoist Static I/O to Module Level
applicable_when: avoids repeated file/network I/O per request

title: Avoid Shared Module State for Request Data
applicable_when: prevents concurrency bugs and request data leaks

title: Parallel Data Fetching with Component Composition
Use GestureDetector for Animated Press States
applicable_when: UI thread animations, smoother press feedback

title: Animate Transform and Opacity Instead of Layout Properties
Use Compound Components Over Polymorphic Children
Load fonts natively at build time
applicable_when: fonts available at launch, no async loading

title: Import from Design System Folder
applicable_when: enables global changes and easy refactoring

title: Hoist callbacks to the root of lists
Optimize List Performance with Stable Object References
Avoid Inline Objects in renderItem
applicable_when: prevents unnecessary re-renders of memoized list items

title: Keep List Items Lightweight
applicable_when: reduces render time for visible items during scroll

title: Pass Primitives to List Items for Memoization
Use Item Types for Heterogeneous Lists
Use a List Virtualizer for Any List
Install Native Dependencies in App Directory
Use Single Dependency Versions Across Monorepo
Destructure Functions Early in Render (React Compiler)
Use .get() and .set() for Reanimated Shared Values (not .value)
useState Dispatch updaters for State That Depends on Current Value
applicable_when: avoids stale closures, prevents unnecessary re-renders

title: Use fallback state instead of initialState
Minimize State Variables and Derive Values
Never Use && with Potentially Falsy Values
Never Track Scroll Position in useState
State Must Represent Ground Truth
applicable_when: cleaner logic, easier debugging, single source of truth

title: Use expo-image for Optimized Images
applicable_when: memory efficiency, caching, blurhash placeholders, progressive loading

title: Use Galeria for Image Galleries and Lightbox
Use Native Menus for Dropdowns and Context Menus
Use Native Modals Over JS-Based Bottom Sheets
Use Pressable Instead of Touchable Components
Use contentInsetAdjustmentBehavior for Safe Areas
applicable_when: native safe area handling, no layout shifts

title: Use contentInset for Dynamic ScrollView Spacing
Modern React Native Styling Patterns
applicable_when: consistent design, smoother borders, cleaner layouts

title: Avoid `presentation: 'transparentModal'` on Bridgeless + react-native-screens
applicable_when: silent visual breakage — component tree renders correctly but native view is opaque white

title: Use Reactive Query Hooks, Not Imperative Cache Reads
Avoid Reanimated Layout Animations in Virtualized Lists
applicable_when: prevents recycling breakage and layout jumping

title: Consume Theme Hooks Inside List Items, Not in renderItem
applicable_when: prevents full list re-render on theme changes
